title: Sate Sushi Beige Coral Floating
copyright_notice: Reference for design study. Not for redistribution.
typography_summary: Bold sans coral + sans body + sans tracked caps
composition_summary: Asymmetric vertical split · pattern left · hero+display right
why_good: Asymmetric split (left pattern panel / right hero+display) — composition forte
Floating sushi pieces como accents reforçam product story
Display 'SATE SUSHI' coral em beige bg = warm two-tone restraint
Wave pattern subtle no beige bg dá texture sem ruído
caveats: Coral red mais saturado que paleta Só Rio. Composition split + floating accents é a key takeaway
